The correct translation is "If Delilah is in New York City, then Juana is in Bogota or Layla is in San Juan."  
This is a conditional statement with a disjunction in the consequent, so the logical form is \( \text{Nd} \supset (\text{Bj} \lor \text{Sl}) \).  
Thus, the correct choice is D.

\boxed{D}
